paper.title: Geometric Origin of Macroscopic Alignment in Granular Flows
paper.abstract: Predicting the alignment of non-spherical particles in dense granular flows under shear remains a central challenge in soft matter physics. We demonstrate that the first-order behavior of granular fabric,the anisotropic distribution of contacts, is a direct consequence of particle boundary geometry. By assuming uniform contact probability along a particle's perimeter, we derive a mapping between local curvature and the macroscopic distribution of contact normals. This minimal geometric framework accurately predicts the uniaxial nematic order parameter S2 observed in both three-dimensional discrete element simulations and laboratory experiments using various particle geometries (e.g., rice, fibers, and disks) across a wide range of aspect ratios. Our results show that particle shape dictates the available orientation statistics, providing a purely geometric baseline for the emergence of fabric in dense granular systems.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper shows that dense-shear granular fabric alignment can be predicted from particle boundary geometry by mapping uniformly sampled contact locations to contact-normal statistics via curvature weighting, matching simulations and rice-grain experiments.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文表明，在密集剪切颗粒流中，接触法向统计可由粒子边界曲率的几何映射预测，从而无需动力学细节即可较好复现实验与数值中的单轴二向性序参数。
summary_en: problem: Predicting the shear-induced nematic fabric (contact anisotropy) of non-spherical particles in dense granular flows from first principles remains challenging.

approach: Assume uniform probability of contacts along a particle perimeter, derive a curvature-based mapping from boundary geometry to contact-normal orientation distributions, and compute the resulting S2 order parameter.

key result: The curvature-driven geometric framework accurately reproduces S2 across a wide aspect-ratio range in 3D DEM and laboratory experiments for diverse shapes, with poorer but explainable performance for some limiting geometries (e.g., disks/rods using a rectangle approximation).
summary_zh: problem: 如何从第一性原理预测密集颗粒剪切下非球形颗粒的织构（接触各向异性）仍是难题。
approach: 假设沿粒子周长接触概率均匀，通过边界曲率对接触法向取向分布进行几何映射，并由此计算单轴序参数S2。
key result: 该基于曲率的几何框架能在较宽长宽比范围内准确复现实验与三维DEM中的S2；对某些形状（如用矩形近似描述的圆盘/杆）的一致性较弱但可由形状极限解释。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides a minimal, curvature-based first-principles geometric mapping from particle boundary shape to the contact-normal orientation distribution, yielding quantitative predictions of the terminal nematic order parameter S2 without explicitly modeling force-chain dynamics.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一个最小的基于曲率的几何映射框架：将粒子边界形状直接映射到接触法向取向分布，从而在不显式建模力链动力学的情况下对稳态二向性序参数S2给出定量预测。
analysis.method_en: Derive contact-normal orientation probability from perimeter-arc-length to normal-angle change of variables under the assumption of uniform contact sampling along the particle boundary; use curvature weighting to generate orientation ensembles (via analytical forms for ellipses and perimeter sampling for rectangles), then compute the nematic order parameter S2 from the eigenvalues of the symmetric traceless orientation tensor.
analysis.method_zh: 在“沿粒子边界接触位置均匀取样”的假设下，通过周长弧长到法向角度的变量变换，将接触法向概率与曲率加权关联；对椭圆形状使用解析表达并进行取样，对矩形等分段平坦形状直接按周长均匀采样生成取向集合，随后用对称无迹取向张量的最大特征值计算S2。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified (comparison uses 3D frictional DEM datasets of ellipsoids and experiments on rice grains; particle shapes include ellipsoids, fibers, disks, and disks/rods approximated by rectangular cross-sections).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明（主要与3D摩擦颗粒离散元DEM数据以及水稻颗粒实验进行对比；形状包含椭球、纤维、圆盘，并对圆盘/杆使用矩形截面近似）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is moderately relevant because it concerns granular fabric evolution under shear; the geometric baseline for contact anisotropy could help interpret and model shape-controlled rheology and anisotropic properties in geophysical granular flows, though it is not a direct geophysical observation/instrument study.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与当前追踪主题有中等相关性，因为它研究的是颗粒剪切下织构演化；粒子形状主导的接触各向异性几何基线可用于理解与建模地球物理颗粒流中的各向异性流变性质，但它并非直接面向特定地球物理观测或仪器的研究。

paper.title: Unified sparse framework for large-scale material point method simulations
paper.abstract: The material point method (MPM) is a hybrid particle-grid method widely used for simulating large deformation with history-dependent behavior. Standard MPM often relies on a dense background grid, which can be highly inefficient when material occupies a small fraction of the computational domain. Such sparsity is common in many large-scale problems, from geophysical mass flows over large terrain domains to visual-computing applications. Here, we introduce a unified sparse background-grid framework for large-scale MPM simulation. The framework treats sparse grid construction as a general active-node indexing problem. We develop two architecture-specific implementations to realize the same sparse framework: a scan-based strategy for CPUs and a hash-based strategy for GPUs. Through benchmark problems and a large-scale landslide simulation, we show that the framework provides the same results as standard dense MPM while reducing computational time and memory usage by one to two orders of magnitude in strongly sparse cases.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper presents a unified sparse-grid framework for material point method simulations that accelerates large-scale, strongly sparse problems like landslides while matching dense-MPM accuracy.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文提出一种统一的稀疏网格材料点法框架，用于加速强稀疏的大规模问题（如滑坡），并在精度上与传统稠密MPM保持一致。
summary_en: Problem: Standard MPM uses dense background grids and becomes inefficient when material occupies only a small fraction of the domain.
Approach: Build a unified sparse background grid by casting sparse node selection as an active-node indexing problem, with CPU scan-based and GPU hash-based implementations.
key result: Benchmarks and a large-scale landslide simulation produce the same results as dense MPM while cutting runtime and memory by one to two orders of magnitude in strongly sparse cases.
summary_zh: 问题：标准MPM依赖稠密背景网格，当材料只占计算域很小比例时会非常低效。
方法：将稀疏网格构建表述为活动节点索引问题，给出CPU扫描式与GPU基于哈希的两种实现来统一稀疏框架。
关键结果：在基准算例与大规模滑坡仿真中，与稠密MPM得到相同结果，并在强稀疏情形将计算时间和内存降低一个到两个数量级。
analysis.contribution_en: A unified sparse background-grid indexing framework for MPM, with architecture-specific (CPU/GPU) sparse grid construction strategies that preserve dense-MPM accuracy while greatly improving efficiency for strongly sparse domains.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出了MPM的统一稀疏背景网格索引框架，并给出CPU/GPU层面的特定稀疏网格构建策略，在保持与稠密MPM一致精度的同时显著提升强稀疏场景的计算效率。
analysis.method_en: Sparse background-grid MPM using active-node indexing: CPU implementation uses scan-based sparse grid construction, while GPU uses hash-based indexing to generate only active grid nodes during simulation.
analysis.method_zh: 基于活动节点索引的稀疏背景网格MPM：CPU采用扫描式稀疏网格构建，GPU采用基于哈希的索引以仅生成仿真中需要的活动网格节点。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Includes benchmark problems and a large-scale landslide simulation; no specific dataset is described.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 包含若干基准算例和一项大规模滑坡仿真；未描述具体数据集。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Highly relevant for geophysical mass-flow and landslide modeling because it makes large-deformation MPM practical on big domains by drastically reducing memory and runtime in sparse occupancy cases.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与地球物理大范围物质流/滑坡建模高度相关：该方法通过在材料占域稀疏时显著降低内存与计算时间，使大形变MPM更可用于大尺度地形。

paper.title: A Method for Imaging Interplanetary Magnetic Field Strength and Orientation
paper.abstract: Measurements of interplanetary magnetic fields have long relied on spacecraft measurements, which provide only in-situ sampling and therefore cannot capture the global magnetic structure. Faraday rotation of radio signals extends in-situ measurements to line-of-sight measurements, but it still depends on the number and spatial distribution of available radio sources. The Zeeman effect offers another route to remote sensing of magnetic fields, but it is generally too weak to diagnose the weak interplanetary magnetic fields. Here, we present a remote-sensing method to constrain weak magnetic field strength and orientation using spectral-line polarization induced by ground-state alignment (GSA) and Hanle effect, with collisional effects taken into account. This method is sensitive to weak magnetic fields in environments ranging from the high solar atmosphere and solar wind to the outer heliosphere, and we identify suitable spectral lines for different targets. We further perform forward modeling of Mercury's magnetosphere to demonstrate the feasibility of this imaging method. Spectral-polarization imaging therefore provides a new way toward remote imaging of dynamic heliospheric magnetic structures.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper develops a remote-sensing approach that uses spectral-line polarization from ground-state alignment and the Hanle effect, including collisions, to image weak interplanetary magnetic-field strength and orientation and demonstrate feasibility with forward modeling of Mercury’s magnetosphere.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该论文提出一种基于地面态对齐与韩勒效应产生的谱线偏振、并考虑碰撞效应的远程成像方法，可约束微弱星际/行星际磁场的强度与方向，并用水星磁层的前向建模验证可行性。
summary_en: problem: In-situ spacecraft measurements cannot capture global interplanetary magnetic-field structure, and existing remote techniques are limited by source availability or insufficient sensitivity to weak fields.

approach: Use spectral-line polarization caused by ground-state alignment and the Hanle effect, with collisional effects included, to infer both magnetic-field strength and orientation and select appropriate spectral lines for targets.
key result: Forward modeling of Mercury’s magnetosphere is used to demonstrate the feasibility of imaging dynamic heliospheric magnetic structures with this spectral-polarization approach.
summary_zh: problem: 原位航天器测量难以获得行星际磁场的全局结构，而现有远程方法要么受射电源分布限制，要么对微弱磁场不够敏感。
approach: 利用由地面态对齐与韩勒效应引起的谱线偏振，并纳入碰撞效应，以同时约束磁场强度和方向，再为不同目标选择合适谱线。
key result: 通过对水星磁层进行前向建模，证明该谱线偏振成像方法实现弱磁场成像的可行性。
analysis.contribution_en: It provides a physics-based remote-sensing framework for imaging weak interplanetary magnetic-field strength and orientation using spectral-line polarization (GSA plus Hanle effect) with collisional effects, along with target-dependent spectral-line identification and feasibility demonstration via Mercury magnetosphere modeling.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出了一个基于谱线偏振（地面态对齐+韩勒效应）并考虑碰撞效应的远程成像框架，用于成像微弱行星际磁场的强度与方向；同时给出面向不同目标的谱线选择，并用水星磁层的建模验证可行性。
analysis.method_en: Spectral-polarization remote sensing leveraging ground-state alignment and the Hanle effect to infer magnetic-field strength and orientation, with collisional effects incorporated; includes forward modeling of a planetary magnetosphere and selection of diagnostic spectral lines for different heliospheric environments.
analysis.method_zh: 利用地面态对齐与韩勒效应产生的谱线偏振进行远程观测反演磁场强度与方向，并在理论计算中纳入碰撞效应；通过行星磁层前向建模验证，并为不同太阳/行星际环境选择诊断谱线。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Feasibility is demonstrated with forward modeling of Mercury’s magnetosphere; otherwise specific datasets/instruments are not specified.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 可行性通过水星磁层的前向建模来展示；除外未明确给出具体数据集/仪器来源。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: It is relevant to space-physics and heliospheric magnetic-field imaging, potentially enabling remote mapping of weak magnetic structures beyond what spacecraft in-situ sampling provides, though it is not directly focused on Earth geophysics.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 它与空间物理/日—行星际磁场成像高度相关，可能使弱磁结构的远程成像成为可能，从而超越仅靠航天器原位采样的局限；但并非直接面向地球地球物理问题。

paper.title: FARSim: a fast RF-chain-aware trigger-screening surrogate for radio detection of ultra-high-energy cosmic rays
paper.abstract: Radio arrays provide a scalable route to detecting extensive air showers from ultra-high-energy cosmic rays, but trigger studies for candidate layouts are expensive when every energy, arrival direction, core position and trigger configuration is evaluated with full radio simulations. We present FARSim, a fast surrogate framework that reuses a reduced library of ZHAireS reference footprints to reconstruct ground-plane radio emission and to estimate trigger-relevant observables. The method combines vector geomagnetic and charge-excess field decomposition, geomagnetic-angle and energy scaling, geometrical projection, contour-based core sampling and event-rate integration. We validate the reconstructed field footprints and trigger regions against dedicated ZHAireS simulations, and quantify the computational gain obtained by replacing repeated full shower simulations with fast footprint queries. We further extend the peak-field surrogate to time-domain electric-field synthesis by combining the predicted three-component peak-field vector with geometry-dependent normalized pulse templates. Propagating these traces through an RF-chain response enables voltage-domain threshold and L1-trigger diagnostics. For the validation samples considered here, the time-domain extension reaches a median vector-waveform R^2 of 0.986 over 2112 hold-out ZHAireS traces when tested at the true peak amplitude. FARSim is therefore intended as a rapid, physics-informed screening layer for array-layout and trigger studies; absolute exposure predictions and detector commissioning remain the role of full end-to-end simulations.

analysis.one_sentence_en: FARSim is a fast radio-simulation surrogate that reconstructs ZHAireS-based radio footprints and time-domain voltages to quickly assess trigger thresholds for ultra-high-energy cosmic-ray radio array layouts.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: FARSim是一种快速无线电仿真替代框架，可利用ZHAireS参考足迹重建辐射场并合成电压波形，从而高效评估超高能宇宙线射电阵列的触发阈值。
summary_en: Problem: Full ZHAireS trigger studies over many energies, directions, core positions, and trigger configurations are computationally expensive.

Approach: FARSim reuses a reduced ZHAireS footprint library with geomagnetic/charge-excess decomposition, energy and geomagnetic-angle scaling, geometric projection, contour-based core sampling, and—optionally—time-domain pulse synthesis through RF-chain response.

Key result: The surrogate reproduces field footprints and trigger regions against dedicated ZHAireS simulations and, for a tested hold-out set, achieves very high median vector-waveform agreement when extending to time-domain synthesis.
summary_zh: 问题：在多个能量、到达方向、核心位置和触发配置下进行完整ZHAireS触发研究计算量巨大。
方法：FARSim通过重用简化的ZHAireS足迹库，结合磁场与电荷超时的分解、能量与地磁角缩放、几何投影、等值线式核心采样，并进一步利用与几何相关的归一化脉冲模板与RF链响应进行时间域合成。
关键结果：该替代模型在场足迹与触发区域上能与专门的ZHAireS仿真对齐，并在所评估的时间域扩展验证样本上获得很高的波形一致性指标。
analysis.contribution_en: A physics-informed, RF-chain-aware surrogate framework that accelerates trigger-screening for ultra-high-energy cosmic-ray radio arrays by replacing repeated full end-to-end radio shower simulations with footprint queries and optional time-domain voltage synthesis.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一种物理约束且考虑RF链效应的替代框架，通过用足迹查询替代重复的完整端到端放电仿真，并可选择性进行时间域电压合成，从而显著加速超高能宇宙线射电阵列的触发筛选。
analysis.method_en: Use a reduced library of ZHAireS reference ground-plane radio footprints; reconstruct geomagnetic and charge-excess components via scaling with geomagnetic angle and energy, apply geometric projection, sample candidate core positions using footprint contours, integrate event rates over the trigger region, and (for time-domain) synthesize three-component electric-field traces using normalized pulse templates and pass them through an RF-chain response to enable voltage threshold and L1-trigger diagnostics.
analysis.method_zh: 使用简化的ZHAireS参考地面足迹库；通过地磁角与能量缩放重建地面辐射场的地磁分量与电荷超时分量，进行几何投影，用足迹等值线进行候选核心位置采样，计算触发区域内的事件率积分；并可在时间域中基于三分量峰值场与几何相关的归一化脉冲模板合成电场波形，再通过RF链响应将其转换为电压以评估电压阈值与L1触发。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Validation uses hold-out ZHAireS simulation traces (2112) for radio footprints and time-domain electric-field synthesis; the paper does not specify a real-world observational site or experimental dataset.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 验证使用一组ZHAireS仿真得到的保留测试迹线（2112条），用于场足迹与时间域电场合成；论文未说明具体的真实观测站点或实验数据集。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is only tangential to Earth-physics/geophysics tracking topics, but it is relevant to instrumentation and RF trigger simulation workflows used in high-energy radio detection.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与当前地球物理/地学追踪主题关联较弱；但它对高能射电探测中的仪器链路与RF触发评估仿真流程具有方法学参考价值。

paper.title: Toward reliable and high-resolution resistivity imaging with Controlled Source EM in land -densifying arrays as a key for success -10 years of progress for geothermal and mineral resources exploration
paper.abstract: The Controlled Source Electromagnetic (CSEM) method aims to image electrical resistivity at intermediate depths (0-3 km) for geothermal, mineral, and groundwater exploration. It was developed both as a deeper extension of DC resistivity (ERT) and as an active alternative to magnetotellurics (MT), capable of overcoming MT's limitations in challenging environments (noisy areas or weak natural signals). As demonstrated in marine settings, CSEM can provide high resolution and complementary illumination compared to MT. However, due to the significant logistical effort required for land deployment, most land-based CSEM surveys have used only a few transmitter positions (often one or two), effectively resembling CSAMT configurations. This limited source coverage results in poor resolution and unreliable resistivity models, where the acquisition footprint can be difficult to distinguish from actual geology. In this work, we review ten years of progress in land CSEM and demonstrate that dense arrays-with dozens to hundreds of synchronized sources and receivers-are key to achieving the high-resolution imaging originally expected. Despite greater logistical demands, we show that such surveys can be conducted with reasonable effort and cost, making them accessible for both industrial and academic applications. Furthermore, CSEM can be combined with MT at minimal additional cost, improving model constraints and reducing exploration risk.

analysis.one_sentence_en: This review argues that land controlled-source EM becomes reliable and high-resolution when deployed as dense, synchronized multi-transmitter and multi-receiver arrays rather than sparse single- or dual-transmitter layouts, and that joint CSEM/MT further improves constraints.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该综述指出，陆地受控源电磁法要获得可靠且高分辨率的电阻率成像，关键在于使用密集同步的多发射源与多接收器阵列，而非稀疏单/双发射源布设，并且联合CSEM/MT可进一步增强约束并降低勘探风险。
summary_en: Problem: Land CSEM surveys often use only one or two transmitter positions, leading to poor illumination balance, spatial aliasing, and unreliable resistivity models whose footprints can be mistaken for geology.

Approach: The authors review a decade of land CSEM progress and synthesize evidence from modeling and field examples, emphasizing dense arrays with dozens to hundreds of synchronized sources and receivers and proposing low-cost joint CSEM/MT acquisition.

Key result: They demonstrate that densifying to achieve balanced multi-source/multi-receiver coverage enables the high-resolution imaging expected for intermediate depths and can be implemented with reasonable effort, cost, and improved constraints when combined with MT.
summary_zh: 问题：陆地CSEM往往只布设一到两个发射位置，导致照明不均衡、空间混叠以及电阻率反演不可靠，甚至使测量阵列足迹难以与真实地质区分。
方法：作者回顾近十年陆地CSEM进展，并结合数值模拟与野外案例，强调使用几十到上百个同步的发射源与接收器构成密集阵列，同时提出以低额外成本联合CSEM/MT采集来提升约束。
关键结果：他们表明将源接收覆盖密度提高到多源—多接收均衡后，可实现原本期望的中等深度高分辨率成像；该策略在现实工作量与成本下可行，并且与MT联合可进一步改善模型约束。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides a decade-spanning synthesis showing that dense, synchronized multi-transmitter/multi-receiver arrays are the decisive design factor for achieving dependable high-resolution land CSEM resistivity imaging, and that joint CSEM/MT can be integrated with minimal extra cost to reduce exploration risk.
analysis.contribution_zh: 总结并论证：陆地CSEM实现可靠、具有高分辨率的电阻率成像，关键设计要素是密集同步的多发射源—多接收器阵列；同时指出联合CSEM/MT可在极低额外成本下提升约束、降低勘探风险。
analysis.method_en: A controlled-source EM workflow for land surveys that uses dense synchronized transmitter and receiver arrays (multi-TX/multi-RX) for intermediate-depth resistivity inversion, with optional joint acquisition and inversion constraints from magnetotellurics.
analysis.method_zh: 陆地受控源电磁的工作流程：通过密集同步的多发射源与多接收器阵列（多TX/多RX）进行中等深度电阻率反演，并可选择与大地电磁（MT）联合采集以增强约束。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Intermediate-depth (0–3 km) land CSEM use cases including examples such as the Kuusamo dataset (Finland) within the UNDERCOVER project; additional references include synthetic studies and other historical/recent field cases.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 研究对象为陆地中等深度（0–3 km）CSEM应用场景；文中给出如芬兰KUUSAMO地区在UNDERCOVER项目中的数据示例，并结合合成模型以及既有与近期野外案例进行说明。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This directly supports the tracked topic of reliable high-resolution resistivity imaging for geothermal/mineral exploration, because it identifies practical array-design requirements (dense multi-TX/multi-RX) and motivates joint CSEM/MT to overcome challenging-noise or weak-signal environments.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这与当前追踪的可靠高分辨率电阻率成像主题高度相关：文章明确提出实现成功成像所需的可操作阵列设计（密集多TX/多RX），并强调联合CSEM/MT有助于在噪声大或天然信号弱的环境中克服MT局限。

paper.title: Lattice-Trapped Atom Interferometry with a Bose-Einstein condensate: Observation and Control of Interactions
paper.abstract: Precision interferometry with atomic wavepackets confined in a one-dimensional optical lattice is an emergent paradigm in quantum sensing of forces and fields, with applications in gravimetry, accelerometry, geophysics, and fundamental physics tests. We report on the realization of a lattice-trapped interferometer where the two arms are sourced from a weakly-interacting ytterbium Bose-Einstein condensate, coherently split and trapped by pulsed optical standing waves before recombination. We directly observe atomic interactions through contrast changes and phase shifts of the interferometer. By changing either the atom number or the sample volume to vary the density, we demonstrate control over interactions and optimize interferometer performance. Our observations are effectively captured by a mean-field theoretical model of the system. This work experimentally probes the boundary where improved performance from source brightening through higher phase space density transitions into a regime beyond single-atom physics in lattice-trapped atom interferometry, and opens a door to incorporating many-body effects for metrological advances in such platforms.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The authors build and control a lattice-trapped atom interferometer using a weakly interacting ytterbium Bose-Einstein condensate, directly observing how interaction strength alters interferometric contrast and phase.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 研究者用弱相互作用的钇原子玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体实现并调控晶格俘获原子干涉仪，直接观测相互作用如何改变干涉对比度与相位。
summary_en: problem: Achieving precise, tunable lattice-trapped atom interferometry beyond the single-atom regime requires direct control and observation of many-body interaction effects.

approach: Coherently split and recombine a lattice-trapped interferometer using pulsed one-dimensional optical standing waves, then vary atom number or volume to change density and fit observations with a mean-field model.

key result: Interaction-induced contrast changes and phase shifts are directly observed, and the interferometer performance can be optimized while demonstrating controllable transition from source-brightening physics toward a beyond-single-atom regime.
summary_zh: problem: 晶格俘获原子干涉精密测量需要在超越单原子极限时实现对多体相互作用的可控与可观测。
approach: 用脉冲一维光学驻波将玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体相干分裂并再合成，同时通过改变原子数或体积来调密度，并用平均场模型解释观测。
key result: 直接观测到由相互作用引起的对比度变化与相位偏移，并表明可通过调参优化干涉仪性能且跨越从源增强主导到超越单原子物理的边界。
analysis.contribution_en: They experimentally realize a lattice-trapped atom interferometer and provide direct, density-tunable observations of interaction-driven contrast and phase changes, quantitatively described by a mean-field theory and mapped across a relevant performance boundary for quantum sensing.
analysis.contribution_zh: 他们实验实现了晶格俘获原子干涉仪，并通过可调密度直接观测由相互作用导致的对比度与相位变化；结果可用平均场理论定量描述，并刻画了与量子测量性能相关的边界。
analysis.method_en: A weakly interacting ytterbium Bose-Einstein condensate is coherently split into two arms and trapped using pulsed one-dimensional optical standing waves, then recombined to form an interferometer; density is tuned by changing atom number or sample volume, and interaction effects are inferred from contrast and phase shifts and compared to a mean-field model.
analysis.method_zh: 使用弱相互作用的钇玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体，通过脉冲一维光学驻波将两臂相干分裂并俘获，随后再合成形成干涉仪；通过改变原子数或样品体积调节密度，并依据对比度与相位偏移来提取相互作用效应，同时与平均场模型对比。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified (table-top cold-atom experiment using a ytterbium Bose-Einstein condensate in a one-dimensional optical lattice).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明（桌面级冷原子实验：用钇玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体在一维光学晶格中实现）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: It is indirectly relevant: while motivated by atom-interferometric sensing for gravimetry/accelerometry and geophysics, the paper focuses on quantum many-body interactions and interferometer control rather than geophysical observations.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 间接相关：尽管研究动机面向原子干涉测量在重力测量/加速度计与地球物理中的应用，但本文重点是多体相互作用与干涉仪控制，而非具体地球物理观测。

paper.title: Unveiling magma plumbing systems for volcanic eruptions and crustal accretion via active-seismic matrix imaging
paper.abstract: Submarine eruptions, accounting for over 80% of Earth's volcanic activity, primarily occur along mid-ocean ridges, where shallow magmatic systems are accessible to high-resolution imaging. Yet, their remoteness often leaves them undetected. Recent seismic studies at the East Pacific Rise (EPR) 9°50'N-one of the most dynamic ridge segments, imaged the detailed architecture of the shallowest magma lens, but no data-constrained model yet explains how magma accumulates, migrates, or triggers eruptions. Similarly, the formation of oceanic crust remains poorly understood. While 2-D seismic data reveal only a few vertically stacked, transient magma lenses, our study applies matrix imaging, a novel technique in controlled-source seismology, to map the inner structure of on- and off-axis magma reservoirs. We uncover a conical on-axis reservoir and interconnected magma-rich zones throughout the crust. Combined with ophiolite evidence, these findings reveal that magma channels dominate the first 3 km for lower crust formation, while in situ crystallization prevails in the final 1 km, resolving a long-standing debate.

analysis.one_sentence_en: Using controlled-source active seismology with 3D matrix imaging, the authors map connected magma-rich regions beneath the East Pacific Rise, showing an on-axis conical reservoir and distinct upper, lower-crustal, and near-Moho domains.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 作者用3D矩阵成像处理主动源海底地震数据，揭示东太平洋海岭下方连通的富岩浆结构，包括轴向锥形储库及分层的下地壳与莫霍附近域。
summary_en: Problem: Conventional 2D seismic images capture only vertically stacked, transient magma lenses yet cannot explain magma accumulation, migration, eruption triggers, and oceanic crust formation at depth.

Approach: Apply 3D active-source matrix imaging (reflection-matrix redatuming with adaptive focusing using an FWI-based velocity model) to the EPR 9°50′N multichannel seismic dataset to obtain depth-resolved 3D reflectivity of magma reservoirs.

Key result: The imaging reveals an on-axis conical magma reservoir with interconnected magma-rich zones, including distinct sub-axial accumulation levels (SUBA1, SUBA2) and a deeper randomly distributed anomaly zone to Moho, supporting magma-channels dominance in the first ~3 km and in-situ crystallization near the final ~1 km.
summary_zh: 问题：传统2D地震成像只能看到零散、短暂的垂向岩浆透镜，难以解释岩浆在深部的聚集、迁移、触发喷发以及海洋地壳的形成过程。
方法：对EPR 9°50′N的三维多道地震资料进行3D主动源矩阵成像，基于FWI速度模型进行反射矩阵测深（redatuming）与自适应聚焦，输出深度分辨的3D反射率体。
关键结果：成像得到轴向锥形岩浆储库及贯通的富岩浆区域，识别出SUBA1、SUBA2等不同深度层级的异常以及到莫霍的更深随机异常带，表明下地壳首~3 km以岩浆通道主导、末~1 km以原位结晶为主。
analysis.contribution_en: This study demonstrates, for the first time, data-constrained 3D matrix imaging of active controlled-source seismic data to resolve the connectivity and depth-dependent architecture of an ocean-ridge magma plumbing system.
analysis.contribution_zh: 该研究首次将数据约束的3D矩阵成像应用于主动源控源地震数据，解析海洋中脊岩浆输运系统的连通性与深度分布构型。
analysis.method_en: 3D active-source matrix imaging using reflection-matrix redatuming to synthesize virtual sources/receivers at depth, with adaptive focusing to compensate phase errors from velocity-model mismatch; an FWI-derived shallow-to-mid crust velocity model is used with constant extrapolation deeper.
analysis.method_zh: 采用反射矩阵测深（在深度处合成虚拟震源/检波器）的3D主动源矩阵成像，并通过自适应聚焦补偿由速度模型不匹配引起的相位误差；使用来自FWI的浅层至中深度速度模型并向更深处做常值外推。
analysis.data_or_region_en: East Pacific Rise (EPR) 9°50′N multichannel seismic reflection dataset from controlled-source active marine seismology; study resolves magma plumbing structures down to ~6 km below the seafloor.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 东太平洋海岭（EPR）9°50′N的控源三维多道海上地震反射资料；深度成像覆盖海底下约~6 km的岩浆输运结构。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Directly relevant to imaging subsurface magma plumbing and crustal accretion using seismic reflection and advanced imaging, informing how connected magma reservoirs relate to eruption processes; it is not only methodological but also geological/tectonic interpretation.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与利用地震反射与高阶成像研究地下岩浆通道与地壳增生高度相关；不仅展示方法可行性，还给出关于连通岩浆储库如何联系喷发过程的地质解释。

paper.title: The upper mantle of Europe and Western Asia: Exposing potentials and limits of regional full-waveform inversion
paper.abstract: We present EUWA310, a seismic velocity model obtained by full seismic waveform inversion (FWI) model of the upper mantle beneath Europe and Western Asia. Inferred via 310 quasi-Newton updates from more than 260$\,$000 three-component seismograms at 18 s minimum period. It increases the number of iterations and the amount of data by an order of magnitude, compared to previous FWI studies in the region. The data include recordings from two dense regional arrays: IberArray on the Iberian Peninsula and in Northern Africa, and AlpArray in the wider Alpine region. The construction of EUWA310 became computationally tractable through the use of dynamic mini-batch optimization and the adoption of wavefield-adaptive spectral-element meshes from the global to regional scales. We also demonstrate that EUWA310 may be used to reduce uncertainties of moment tensor estimates by inverting waveforms with decreasing minimum period until an optimal minimum period of 22 s, below which no additional improvements is achieved. This limit is connected to the termination of the FWI at 18 s period, which did not result from limited computational resources, but from failure to explain data at even shorter periods. Since other continental-scale arrays -- such as USArray or ChinaArray -- are comparable in density and coverage, this observation suggests that we may have reached the regime where data coverage instead of compute power is the main bottleneck in regional FWI.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper builds EUWA310, a continental-scale upper-mantle velocity model from large-scale full-waveform inversion, and shows its practical limit and benefits for earthquake moment-tensor uncertainty reduction using dense European/North African array data.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文构建EUWA310上地幔速度模型，并利用欧洲/北非稠密阵列的全波形反演数据评估其分辨能力上限及其对地震力矩张量不确定度的改进效果。
summary_en: problem: Regional full-waveform inversion (FWI) at continental scale is constrained by computational cost and by how well shorter-period data can be explained given data coverage.

approach: EUWA310 is produced with 310 quasi-Newton FWI updates using spectral-element forward/adjoint modeling with wavefield-adaptive meshes, dynamic mini-batches, and multiscale period staging from 50 s down to 18 s; it is validated on held-out events and tested for moment-tensor uncertainty reduction by progressively decreasing the minimum period.

key result: Model building to 18 s is computationally feasible, but improvement saturates below an optimal ~22 s minimum period for moment-tensor uncertainty, indicating the key limitation is the ability to fit even shorter-period waveforms rather than compute power, likely driven by data coverage.
summary_zh: problem: 区域尺度的全波形反演在大陆尺度应用中，既受计算成本限制，也取决于短周期数据能否被可靠解释（与数据覆盖有关）。
approach: 通过带波场自适应网格的谱元前向与伴随计算、动态小批量选源以及多尺度频段（50 s逐步到18 s）阶段式反演，进行310次拟牛顿更新得到EUWA310；用未参与反演的事件做泛化验证，并通过逐步降低最小周期来评估对地震力矩张量不确定度的影响。
key result: 建模到18 s在计算上可行，但力矩张量不确定度的改善在最优~22 s最小周期后趋于饱和，表明限制来自更短周期波形拟合能力而非算力，可能主要由数据覆盖不足导致。
analysis.contribution_en: EUWA310 provides a state-of-the-art, continent-scale upper-mantle FWI velocity model for Europe and Western Asia using orders-of-magnitude larger waveform coverage, together with a frequency-dependent assessment of moment-tensor resolvability that identifies a data-coverage-limited regime for regional FWI.
analysis.contribution_zh: 该研究给出了欧洲与西亚部分地区上地幔的高水平大陆尺度全波形反演速度模型EUWA310，并对不同频段下力矩张量可分辨性/不确定度改善进行了评估，指出区域FWI进入“以数据覆盖为主瓶颈”的限制区间。
analysis.method_en: Spectral-element forward and adjoint wavefield simulations with wavefield-adaptive meshes from global to regional scales, combined with dynamic mini-batch optimization (quasi-random source subsets), multiscale FWI staging from 50 s to 18 s, time-frequency phase misfit for inversion windows, L2 complete-seismogram misfit for validation, and L-BFGS trust-region updates of selected Earth parameters.
analysis.method_zh: 采用谱元法进行前向与伴随波场模拟，并使用波场自适应网格（从全球到区域尺度的网格生成与吸收边界处理）；结合动态小批量优化（随机选取源集合的准随机子集）与多尺度FWI分阶段策略（50 s到18 s）；反演使用基于时间-频率窗口的相位不相似度，验证采用完整波形的L2不相似度，并用带置信域的L-BFGS进行模型更新。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Europe and Western Asia (plus parts of the northern Mid-Atlantic ridge, Greenland/Iceland/Jan Mayen, Middle East, Caucasus, West-Central Asia, Hindu Kush, and parts of the Himalayas) using GCMT Mw~5.2–6.7 earthquakes recorded by 7,431 three-component stations (163 events, 261,085 unique source-receiver pairs) including IberArray and AlpArray; validation uses 17 held-out events.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 研究区域为欧洲与西亚（并覆盖大西洋中脊北段、格陵兰/冰岛/扬-马延、西亚、外高加索、西中亚、兴都库什以及喜马拉雅部分地区）；数据来自GCMT Mw约5.2–6.7地震在7,431个三分量台站记录（163个事件、261,085对唯一源-受体组合），并包含IberArray与AlpArray；用17个未参与反演的事件进行验证。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is highly relevant to seismic velocity-modeling by FWI and to practical limits for using short-period waveforms in regional continental studies, and it directly tests earthquake moment-tensor uncertainty improvement and the bottleneck shift toward data coverage.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这对利用全波形反演构建地震速度模型及理解区域大陆尺度短周期数据的实际使用上限非常相关；文中还直接验证了力矩张量不确定度的改进，并指出瓶颈可能从算力转向数据覆盖。

paper.title: MULTISEISMO: A Multimodal Seismic Dataset and Model for Cross-Modal Seismic Understanding
paper.abstract: The application of generalist multimodal models (GMMs) to specialized scientific domains remains limited due to the scarcity of comprehensive domain-specific datasets that integrate multiple data modalities beyond text and images. In seismology, understanding earthquake phenomena requires the synthesis of timeseries waveform data, geographical imagery, and contextual metadata, a multimodal integration absent in existing seismic datasets. We present MultiSeismo, a large scale structured multimodal seismic dataset, comprising over 16K seismic events spanning 13 years (2010 to 2023) across diverse geographical regions. Each event data integrates waveform recordings from global station networks, intensity maps, population exposure visualizations, and a comprehensive textual description within a standardized JSON format. We additionally develop MISCE, a multimodal instruction set on top of raw data to enable supervised training and evaluation of GMMs on seismic reasoning tasks ranging from basic information retrieval to complex cross modal analysis. We leverage MISCE to finetune an existing multimodal model (Unified IO 2) enhanced with a specialized timeseries encoder, which yields SeisModal, the first domain specific multimodal model for comprehensive seismic analysis. Evaluation of state of the art multimodal models on MultiSeismo reveals significant challenges, particularly with time-series data processing for general purpose models, while demonstrating SeisModal's superior performance on seismic multimodal reasoning tasks. These results prove that MultiSeismo provides a rigorous benchmark for future multimodal research in seismology and validate the success of our domain specific architectural adaptations.

analysis.one_sentence_en: MultiSeismo compiles global earthquakes into a structured multimodal dataset and trains a domain-adapted multimodal model, SeisModal, that outperforms general-purpose models on cross-modal seismic reasoning tasks.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: MultiSeismo将全球地震整合为结构化多模态数据集，并训练领域自适应模型SeisModal，在跨模态地震推理任务上优于通用多模态模型。
summary_en: problem: Existing seismology datasets and models are mostly unimodal, limiting multimodal AI that jointly reasons over waveforms, spatial intensity/impact imagery, and contextual text/metadata.

approach: Build the MultiSeismo dataset by curating waveforms plus ShakeMap-derived intensity and population exposure images and rich text fields from NEIC/USGS into standardized JSON, then create MISCE instructions to train and evaluate multimodal models, fine-tuning Unified-IO 2 into SeisModal with a specialized time-series encoder.

key result: Evaluation on MultiSeismo shows general-purpose multimodal models struggle, especially on time-series handling, while SeisModal achieves better performance on seismic multimodal reasoning tasks, establishing a benchmark for future research.
summary_zh: problem: 现有地震数据集与模型多为单模态，难以支持同时理解波形、空间震强/影响影像以及文本与元数据的多模态推理。
approach: 从NEIC/USGS系统爬取并清洗波形、ShakeMap震强与人口暴露影像以及多字段文本，统一封装为结构化JSON；再提出MISCE指令集用于训练/评测多模态模型，并在Unified-IO 2基础上通过带专用时间序列编码器的微调得到SeisModal。
key result: 在MultiSeismo上的评测表明通用多模态模型在时间序列处理上困难较大，而SeisModal在地震多模态推理任务上表现更好，形成未来研究的基准。
analysis.contribution_en: A large-scale, structured multimodal earthquake benchmark (MultiSeismo) with standardized JSON event samples combining global station waveforms, ShakeMap intensity and population exposure imagery, and contextual text/metadata, plus a domain-adapted multimodal model (SeisModal) and an instruction set (MISCE) for supervised seismic reasoning evaluation.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出大规模结构化地震多模态基准（MultiSeismo），将全球台站波形、ShakeMap震强与人口暴露影像以及上下文文本/元数据统一到标准JSON事件样本中；并给出指令集MISCE与领域自适应多模态模型SeisModal用于监督式地震推理评测。
analysis.method_en: Curate earthquake events (M≥2.5) from USGS NEIC/ShakeMap archives, download waveform recordings via IRIS/Obspy, scrape and clean supporting text from multiple event pages, extract intensity and population exposure images, store per-event multimodal packages in standardized JSON, then train/evaluate generalist multimodal models using MISCE instructions and fine-tune Unified-IO 2 with a specialized time-series encoder to produce SeisModal.
analysis.method_zh: 从USGS NEIC/ShakeMap归档按M≥2.5采集地震事件，通过IRIS/Obspy下载波形记录；从多个事件页面抓取并清洗文本信息，提取震强与人口暴露影像；将每个事件的多模态内容封装为标准JSON，再用MISCE指令集训练/评测多模态模型，并在Unified-IO 2上微调加入专用时间序列编码器得到SeisModal。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Global earthquake events from 2010–2023 (over 16K events) compiled from USGS NEIC/ShakeMap with waveform recordings from global station networks; dataset intended for worldwide spatial coverage.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 全球地震事件，时间范围2010–2023，超过1.6万例；数据来自USGS NEIC/ShakeMap，并结合来自全球台网的波形记录，覆盖全球空间分布。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Directly relevant to multimodal AI for seismic event understanding because it provides waveform+context+impact imagery in one benchmark and tests cross-modal seismic reasoning, while revealing where generalist models fail.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与地震多模态理解高度相关：该工作把波形、上下文与影响影像统一到同一基准中，并测试跨模态地震推理，同时揭示通用模型的关键不足。

paper.title: FMSIM: A Multimodal Flow Matching Framework for Conditional Geomodeling
paper.abstract: Subsurface geomodeling plays a critical role in reservoir characterization, uncertainty quantification, and subsurface flow prediction. However, integrating heterogeneous sources of geological information, including conceptual geological descriptions, sparse well observations, and spatial prior constraints, remains a significant challenge for traditional geostatistical and data-driven geomodeling approaches. In this study, we present FMSIM, a multi-modal conditional flow matching framework for subsurface facies model generation. FMSIM utilizes a deep learning formulation to learn a velocity field that transports samples from a simple prior distribution to a complex geological facies distribution. Global geological semantic information is incorporated through a learned semantic representation framework and a learned prior model, while local hard constraints are enforced via an iterative projection strategy during sampling to ensure 100% fidelity to well observations. Additionally, a temporal guidance gating mechanism is introduced to regulate the influence of spatial probability maps, balancing large-scale trend alignment with fine-scale geological variability. Benefiting from the framework design, the model enables efficient and stable training with a simple loss function. The framework's fully convolutional architecture also demonstrates promising generalization to moderately larger grid sizes not seen during training without retraining. Results on a synthetic fluvial channel dataset indicate that FMSIM captures complex non-stationary geological features and produces geologically consistent realizations under multi-modal conditioning. This approach offers a flexible tool for incorporating conceptual geological knowledge, sparse observational data, and spatial priors into probabilistic subsurface geomodeling workflows.

analysis.one_sentence_en: FMSIM is a multimodal flow-matching framework that generates conditioned subsurface facies realizations by combining text-derived semantics, sparse well constraints, and spatial probability priors with exact well fidelity via iterative projection.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: FMSIM通过流匹配生成模型融合文本语义、稀疏井约束与空间概率先验，并利用迭代投影在采样阶段实现井点100%一致的地质相带实现。
summary_en: problem: Integrating heterogeneous geological information (global conceptual descriptions, sparse well observations, and spatial priors) into probabilistic facies generation while preserving realism and data consistency is difficult.

approach: FMSIM trains a U-Net-based conditional flow-matching velocity model using CLIP-style text-image semantics, a learned embedding prior, soft spatial probability conditioning, and an iterative hard-constraint projection with temporal gating during sampling.

key result: On a synthetic fluvial channel facies dataset, FMSIM produces geologically consistent multimodal realizations that capture complex non-stationary channel structures and generalizes to moderately larger grids without retraining.
summary_zh: problem: 将不同类型地质信息（全局概念描述、稀疏井观测、空间先验）统一到概率化相带生成中，同时兼顾地质真实感与数据一致性很难。
approach: FMSIM用基于CLIP的文本-图像语义编码与学习先验来提供全局语义，用井点与概率图等空间约束进行条件注入，并在采样时采用迭代硬约束投影与时间门控实现可控且精确的条件满足。
key result: 在合成河流-渠道相带数据集上，FMSIM能生成多模态且地质一致的实现，捕捉复杂非平稳渠道结构，并在不重训的情况下对训练未见的更大网格尺寸表现出可用泛化。
analysis.contribution_en: The paper proposes FMSIM, a unified multimodal conditional flow-matching framework for subsurface facies modeling that combines semantic text guidance, sparse well conditioning with exact fidelity via iterative projection, and spatial probability priors using temporal gating, enabling efficient training and controllable probabilistic generation.
analysis.contribution_zh: 该论文提出FMSIM：一种统一的多模态条件流匹配框架，用于地下相带建模，将文本语义引导、通过迭代投影实现井点精确一致的稀疏条件，以及带时间门控的空间概率先验整合到同一生成流程中，实现高效训练与可控的概率化生成。
analysis.method_en: Train a U-Net-based velocity-field predictor under conditional flow matching; encode text via CLIP-style text-image alignment and a transformer prior that maps text embeddings to image-embedding distributions; inject spatial conditioning (well facies, well masks, facies probability maps) by channel-wise concatenation; during sampling, enforce wells with iterative projection/injection and regulate probability-map influence with a temporal guidance gating schedule.
analysis.method_zh: 训练用于条件流匹配的U-Net速度场预测器；通过CLIP风格的文本-图像对齐对文本进行编码，并用Transformer先验将文本嵌入映射到图像嵌入分布；将空间条件（井相、井掩膜、相概率图）以通道拼接形式注入；采样时通过迭代投影/井点注入实现井点硬约束一致性，并用时间门控调节概率图的引导强度。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Synthetic fluvial channel facies dataset; grid-size generalization is tested on moderately larger grids than those used in training (exact sizes not specified).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 合成河流-渠道相带数据集；在训练未覆盖的更大网格（“中等幅度”更大）上测试了泛化能力（具体网格尺寸未说明）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Directly relevant to probabilistic subsurface geomodeling for reservoir and flow prediction because it targets facies generation under mixed semantic (conceptual) and physical (well/priors) constraints; however, it is demonstrated on synthetic data, so field validation remains to be seen.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与当前的地下地质/相带概率建模追踪主题高度相关，因其面向“语义概念+物理约束（井点与先验概率）”的混合条件生成；但目前主要在合成数据上验证，现场适用性仍需进一步评估。

paper.title: Recovery of directional wave spectrum from sparse data with compressed sensing
paper.abstract: Compressed sensing provides an efficient framework for reconstructing wave signals from reduced measurements. For multi-channel buoy data, the three displacement components exhibit intrinsic correlations, as wave motion contributes simultaneously to all directions according to linear wave theory. Meanwhile, conventional compressed sensing methods based on $\ell_1$-shrinkage tend to underestimate signal energy when sparsity is not strictly satisfied, leading to biased spectral estimation. This paper introduces a group sparsity constraint to promote physically consistent sparse representations across channels. An energy constraint is proposed in the form of a soft lower bound, enabling an isotropic rescaling of the recovered spectrum while preserving its sparse structure. Considering a large volume of buoy data, we demonstrate through a series of experiments that the proposed approach enables compression by retaining a subset of original measurements.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper reconstructs directional ocean-wave spectra from sparsely sampled multi-component buoy measurements using compressed sensing with group sparsity across displacement channels and an energy-preserving correction to reduce spectral bias.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该论文通过带通道间组稀疏约束的压缩感知与能量校正，从稀疏采样的多分量浮标观测中重建定向海浪谱，并减轻传统方法的能量低估偏差。
summary_en: problem: Directional wave spectrum estimation from reduced multi-component buoy measurements is biased by standard ℓ1-based compressed sensing when sparsity is not strictly satisfied.

approach: Introduce a physically consistent compressed-sensing framework with group sparsity across the three displacement components and a soft lower-bound energy constraint solved via an ADMM scheme.

key result: Experiments on Bideford Bay buoy data show the proposed framework enables directional spectrum reconstruction from a subset of measurements while preserving essential spectral structure and correcting systematic energy underestimation.
summary_zh: problem: 在稀疏或不可严格稀疏的情况下，基于ℓ1的压缩感知会导致从多分量浮标稀疏观测重建定向海浪谱出现能量低估偏差。
approach: 构建融入物理一致性的压缩感知框架，引入跨三分量的组稀疏约束，并用软下界的能量约束配合ADMM求解。
key result: 基于Bideford Bay浮标数据的实验表明，该方法能在仅保留部分测量的条件下重建定向海浪谱，并保持主要谱结构且纠正系统性能量低估。
analysis.contribution_en: A physics-informed compressed-sensing reconstruction framework for multi-component directional wave spectra that enforces cross-channel structured sparsity and corrects ℓ1-induced energy bias via a soft energy lower bound within an ADMM optimization scheme.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一种面向多分量定向海浪谱的物理约束压缩感知重建框架：通过跨通道的结构化组稀疏刻画三分量一致性，并用软能量下界在ADMM框架下校正传统ℓ1重建导致的能量低估偏差。
analysis.method_en: Formulate sparse recovery of Fourier-domain wave spectral coefficients from partial multi-channel buoy measurements using a compressed sensing model solved by ADMM: apply element-wise sparsity plus frequency-support group sparsity across channels in the sparse step, then apply an isotropic energy-rescaling step using a soft lower-bound constraint while preserving coefficient direction.
analysis.method_zh: 将多通道浮标在部分采样条件下的观测建模为傅里叶域谱系数的压缩感知重建问题，并用ADMM求解：在稀疏步骤中施加元素级稀疏与跨通道的频率组稀疏，在能量校正步骤中使用软下界能量约束进行各向同性能量重标定，从而保持系数的方向结构不变。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Bideford Bay buoy data (UK; not further specified in the excerpt).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: Bideford Bay浮标数据（英国；在该摘要摘录中未进一步说明）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: For the tracked topic of reconstructing wave directional spectra from limited measurements, the work is directly relevant because it targets bias-free compressed-sensing spectral recovery from sparse buoy recordings and demonstrates practical measurement compression.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 对当前追踪主题（在观测受限时重建波浪定向谱）而言，该论文高度相关，因为它直接面向浮标稀疏记录的偏差校正谱重建，并通过实验展示了可实现的测量压缩。

paper.title: Deep Learning-Enabled Prediction of Geoeffective CMEs Using SOHO and SDO Observations
paper.abstract: Understanding and forecasting the geoeffectiveness of a coronal mass ejection (CME) is crucial for protecting infrastructure in the near-Earth space environment and on Earth. In this study, we present a novel fusion model to forecast the geoeffectiveness of CME events. Our model combines convolutional neural networks for feature learning and a prediction network for feature fusion and event classification. The model is trained by observations from instruments including the Large Angle Spectroscopic Coronagraph (LASCO) on board the Solar and Heliospheric Observatory (SOHO) and the Atmospheric Imaging Assembly (AIA) and Helioseismic and Magnetic Imager (HMI) on board the Solar Dynamics Observatory (SDO). The trained model is then used to predict whether an Earth-reaching CME will cause a geomagnetic storm and/or the probability that the CME will cause such a storm. Experimental results based on a five-fold cross validation scheme demonstrate the good performance of our fusion model, achieving a mean true skill statistic (TSS) score of 0.703 when the model is used as a deterministic prediction tool, and a mean Brier score of 0.095 when the model is used as a probabilistic forecasting tool, where a TSS score of 1 or a Brier score of 0 indicates perfect performance. This work contributes to forecasting the causal relationship between Earth-directed CMEs and geomagnetic storms in solar-terrestrial interactions.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper introduces a multimodal deep fusion model that learns from SOHO/LASCO and SDO/AIA-HMI observations to predict whether Earth-directed CMEs will cause geomagnetic storms, either deterministically or probabilistically.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该研究提出一种多模态深度融合模型，利用SOHO/LASCO与SDO/AIA-HMI观测来预测指向地球的CMEs是否会引发地磁风暴，并支持确定性与概率性预报。
summary_en: problem: Forecast the geoeffectiveness of Earth-directed CMEs and their likelihood of triggering geomagnetic storms.
approach: Train a multimodal fusion network that extracts visual features from LASCO C2, AIA 193/211 Å, and HMI magnetograms, then fuses features for binary classification and storm probability.

key result: Using 5-fold cross-validation on 164 Earth-reaching CME events (RC list, 2011–2024), the model attains mean TSS=0.703 for deterministic prediction and mean Brier=0.095 for probabilistic forecasting.
summary_zh: problem: 预测指向地球的CMEs的地球效应，以及其诱发地磁风暴的可能性。
approach: 构建多模态融合网络，从LASCO C2、AIA 193/211 Å与HMI磁图中提取特征并进行融合，输出是否地球有效与地磁风暴概率。
key result: 在RC列表的164个指向地球CMEs（2011–2024）上进行5折交叉验证，确定性预测平均TSS=0.703，概率性预报平均Brier=0.095。
analysis.contribution_en: A multimodal deep-learning fusion framework combining ResNet50, EfficientNet-B0, and a vision transformer to predict CME geoeffectiveness from coupled SOHO and SDO remote-sensing observations, with both deterministic and calibrated probabilistic outputs.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一种多模态深度学习融合框架，将ResNet50、EfficientNet-B0与视觉Transformer结合起来，仅基于SOHO与SDO的遥感观测来预测CME地球有效性，并给出确定性与概率性两类输出。
analysis.method_en: Event-based fusion: aggregate time windows of LASCO C2 (base-difference), AIA 193 Å/211 Å images, and HMI line-of-sight magnetograms; encode each data type with a pair of CNNs (ResNet50 and EfficientNet-B0) via transfer learning; fuse CNN features with an attention/ensemble module; apply a vision transformer and an MLP with sigmoid output to produce geoeffectiveness probability, using a tuned threshold for deterministic classification and probability score for probabilistic forecasting.
analysis.method_zh: 基于事件的融合：对每个CME事件截取LASCO C2（使用差分处理）、AIA 193/211 Å图像以及HMI视线磁图的时间窗；分别用成对CNN（ResNet50与EfficientNet-B0，经迁移学习微调）提取各模态特征；通过注意力/集成模块融合特征；再接入视觉Transformer与MLP（sigmoid输出）得到地球有效性概率；用验证集调参阈值实现确定性分类，并直接使用概率用于概率性预报。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Earth-directed CME events from the Richardson & Cane (RC) list (2011–2024); 164 events with recorded LASCO observing times and corresponding Dst values, using SOHO/LASCO C2, SDO/AIA 193 Å & 211 Å, and SDO/HMI observations; storm defined as Dst < −50 nT.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 使用Richardson & Cane（RC）列表中的指向地球CME事件（2011–2024）；共164个带LASCO观测时间且有对应Dst值的事件，并调用SOHO/LASCO C2、SDO/AIA 193 Å/211 Å与SDO/HMI观测；将地磁风暴定义为Dst < −50 nT。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is directly relevant to space-weather forecasting because it targets the solar-to-terrestrial causal link between Earth-directed CMEs and geomagnetic storms using remote-sensing solar observations.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 该工作与空间天气预报高度相关，因为它直接面向太阳-地球耦合中“指向地球的CMEs→地磁风暴”的因果关系，并仅利用太阳遥感观测进行预测。

paper.title: Scalable Gaussian Process for Learning Non-Ergodic Ground Motion Model from Physics-Based Simulations with Application to Power Infrastructure Assessment
paper.abstract: This study presents the development and application of a scalable non-ergodic ground motion model (NGMM) for the Los Angeles area. The NGMM is trained and validated on physics-based simulated ground-motion data from a recent Statewide California Earthquake Center (SCEC) CyberShake study. The NGMM is formulated as a Gaussian Process (GP) regression model, where the prior median is defined as the ASK14 ergodic ground-motion model and the posterior median is obtained by learning the non-ergodic effects embedded in the training data. These non-ergodic effects include systematic site and path effects, which are represented in the GP using Matérn and specialized covariance kernels that explicitly characterize path vectors. Implementing the NGMM requires hyperparameter tuning and inference on large datasets (on the order of one million data points or more), posing significant computational challenges for conventional GP approaches. To address this scalability issue, this paper presents a suite of computational strategies, including sparse Cholesky inversion, parallel computing, GPU acceleration, and stochastic gradient descent minimization. Despite these advances, the full CyberShake dataset (on the order of hundreds of millions of data points) remains computationally prohibitive. Therefore, aleatory variability is modeled separately using a mixed-effects formulation to represent within-event and between-event variability. The developed NGMM has two primary applications: interpolation of partially observed ground-motion fields and predictive modeling for ground motions in unobserved earthquake scenarios. Validation results on independent datasets demonstrate accurate performance in both applications. A case study of power transmission network assessment in an Mw 6.7 Puente Hill scenario further demonstrated that the developed NGMM closely reproduces physics-based simulation results.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The authors develop a scalable non-ergodic Gaussian-process ground-motion model trained on large SCEC CyberShake simulations for Los Angeles, enabling accurate interpolation and unobserved-scenario prediction while reproducing physics-based results for power-network risk assessments.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 作者利用SCEC CyberShake超大规模模拟数据为洛杉矶构建可扩展的非遍历高斯过程地震动模型，用于场地与路径的非遍历效应学习，并实现插值与未观测情景预测及电力基础设施评估。
summary_en: problem: Conventional ergodic ground-motion models neglect repeatable regional site/path effects, and GP-based non-ergodic NGMMs become computationally infeasible on very large physics-based simulation datasets.

approach: Train a GP NGMM using an ASK14 ergodic backbone as the prior median, learn systematic non-ergodic effects with Matérn and path-vector covariance kernels, and use scalable GP inference (sparse Cholesky, parallel/GPU, stochastic gradient optimization) plus a mixed-effects decomposition to separate aleatory variability.

key result: Validations on independent datasets show accurate interpolation and unobserved-scenario prediction, and a Puente Hills case study demonstrates close reproduction of CyberShake-based power transmission network performance with substantially reduced computational cost, highlighting large bias when non-ergodic effects are ignored.
summary_zh: problem: 遍历性（ergodic）地震动模型忽略可重复的区域场地/路径效应，而基于高斯过程的非遍历NGMM在超大规模物理仿真数据上计算代价过高。
approach: 以ASK14作为遍历性骨干模型的先验中位数，用Matérn与显式刻画路径向量的协方差核学习系统性非遍历效应；结合稀疏Cholesky、并行/GPU以及随机梯度优化的可扩展推断，并用混合效应分解将“固有（aleatory）”变异分开处理。
key result: 在独立数据集上的验证表明其能准确完成部分观测场地场插值与未纳入情景的预测；在Mw 6.7 Puente Hills电力输电网络案例中，该模型能以显著更低计算成本逼真复现CyberShake结果，并表明忽略非遍历效应会导致损伤估计偏差。
analysis.contribution_en: Introduces a scalable non-ergodic Gaussian-process ground-motion model that learns repeatable site and path effects from massive physics-based CyberShake simulations, combining advanced scalable GP inference with an aleatory-variability mixed-effects decomposition to enable practical interpolation and surrogate prediction.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一种可扩展的非遍历高斯过程地震动模型：从海量CyberShake物理仿真中学习可重复的场地与路径效应，并通过可行的可扩展GP推断与混合效应分解相结合，使插值与未观测情景的代理预测具备可计算性与精度。
analysis.method_en: Gaussian Process regression for NGMM using an ASK14 ergodic ground-motion model as the GP prior median; systematic non-ergodic effects represented via Matérn and specialized covariance kernels that depend on path vectors; scalable training/inference using sparse Cholesky inversion, parallel computing, GPU acceleration, and stochastic gradient descent; aleatory variability handled separately via a mixed-effects formulation (within-event vs between-event), enabling training on scenario-level collocation summaries and treating primary/secondary aleatory components.
analysis.method_zh: 用高斯过程回归构建NGMM：以ASK14遍历性地震动模型作为先验中位数，采用Matérn及依赖路径向量的专用协方差核刻画系统性非遍历场地/路径效应；通过稀疏Cholesky、并行计算、GPU加速与随机梯度下降实现大规模训练与推断；并用混合效应将“固有变异”分别建模（区分事件内/事件间），从而将主要/次要固有分量分开并在更小的情景级汇总数据上训练。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Los Angeles / Southern California area; physics-based ground-motion data from SCEC CyberShake Study 22.12 (PSA at 2.0 s extracted from simulations at 335 sites), based on a UCERF2-derived rupture catalog with many rupture variations (final dataset reported as 206.7 million records from 8,358 scenarios).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 洛杉矶/南加州区域；SCEC CyberShake研究22.12的物理仿真地震动数据（从335个台站模拟中提取2.0 s周期的PSA），基于UCERF2衍生断层破裂情景并包含大量破裂变体（文中给出最终数据集为206.7百万条记录、8,358个情景）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is directly relevant to non-ergodic ground-motion modeling and regional site/path effects, but its contribution is largely methodological scalability and engineering assessment use rather than new ground-motion physics.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与非遍历地震动建模以及区域场地/路径可重复效应高度相关；但其核心创新更偏向于大规模建模与工程评估的实现，而非提出新的地震动物理机理。

paper.title: Integrating b-Value and Background Seismicity Rate for Spatial Earthquake Forecasting in the Alborz Region, Northern Iran
paper.abstract: In this study, we evaluate the spatial forecasting skill of the $b$-value and background seismicity rate $μ$ across the Alborz region using a homogenized catalog of 23,961 earthquakes ($M \geq 1.5$) recorded by the Iranian Seismological Center between 2006 and 2024. Forecast performance for $M \geq 4.0$ and $M \geq 4.5$ is assessed using Molchan error diagrams, probability gain, probability difference, and the modified area skill score. The results show that $μ$ provides a consistently strong spatial signal, with Molchan curves well below the random baseline and probability gains of 5--6 at low alarm rates, reflecting the persistent clustering of seismicity along major Alborz faults. The $b$-value exhibits limited skill at lower magnitudes but improves steadily with increasing magnitude; its skill score becomes positive above $M \approx 5.3$, indicating that $b$-value anomalies begin to capture meaningful stress concentrations only for larger events. Spatial patterns reveal low $b$ zones along active reverse and strike-slip structures and high $μ$ zones following long-term seismicity clusters, underscoring their complementary physical roles. Retrospective testing confirms this complementarity: the combined $b$--$μ$ forecast achieves detection rates of 0.81--0.83 at spatial alarm rates of 0.43 and 0.36 for $M \geq 4.0$ and $M \geq 4.5$, respectively, representing the most efficient forecast configuration among all tested models. These findings demonstrate that integrating stress-state and tectonic-loading indicators yields a more efficient and physically grounded framework for operational earthquake forecasting in the Alborz region.

analysis.one_sentence_en: Using a homogenized Iranian earthquake catalog, the study finds that background seismicity rate μ consistently forecasts where moderate-to-large earthquakes will cluster in the Alborz, while b-value adds useful skill only for larger magnitudes, and their combination is most efficient.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 基于伊朗阿尔博兹地区同一化地震目录，该研究发现背景地震率μ能稳定刻画中到大地震的空间聚集，而b值仅在更大震级才提供有效增益，二者联合预测最有效。
summary_en: problem: Improve operational intermediate- to long-term spatial earthquake forecasting in the tectonically complex Alborz region using physically interpretable indicators.

approach: Estimate spatial b-value and ETAS-derived background seismicity rate μ from a declustered, homogenized earthquake catalog, then evaluate individual and joint alarm maps with Molchan error diagrams, probability gain/difference, and area skill scores.

key result: μ alone shows consistently strong spatial forecasting skill for M≥4.0 and M≥4.5, b-value becomes positively skillful above about M≈5.3, and the combined b–μ forecast achieves detection rates around 0.81–0.83 at low spatial alarm rates (0.43 and 0.36).
summary_zh: problem: 在构造复杂的阿尔博兹地区提升具物理可解释性的中长期空间地震预测能力。
approach: 从同一化并去簇后的地震目录估算空间b值与ETAS背景地震率μ，基于Molchan误差图以及概率增益/差与修正面积技能评分评估单独与联合预警图的效果。
key result: 对M≥4.0与M≥4.5，背景地震率μ具持续的强空间预测能力；b值在约M≈5.3以上才出现正技能，而b–μ联合预报在空间报警率0.43与0.36时的探测率约为0.81–0.83。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides a spatial forecasting framework for the Alborz region that integrates stress-structure sensitivity (b-value) and tectonic-loading persistence (background seismicity rate μ), showing measurable synergy and identifying magnitude-dependent usefulness of each indicator.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出面向阿尔博兹地区的空间预测框架，将应力-结构敏感性（b值）与构造加载持续性（背景地震率μ）进行整合，展示二者的互补协同，并揭示各指标的震级依赖有效性。
analysis.method_en: Homogenize local magnitudes to moment magnitude, estimate spatial b-value with a hierarchical space–time point-process spline (HIST-PPM) approach using maximum-likelihood b estimation with magnitude completeness handling, estimate spatial μ via ETAS declustering followed by variable-bandwidth Gaussian kernel reconstruction, then convert b and μ maps into alarm cells and score them using Molchan error diagrams, probability gain/difference, and modified area skill score; joint alarms require both low-b and high-μ criteria.
analysis.method_zh: 将地方震级统一转换为矩震级；用HIST-PPM样条框架估算并空间化b值（结合最大似然估计与完备度处理），用ETAS去簇得到背景过程并以变带宽高斯核重建空间μ；随后将b与μ栅格转化为预警区域，并用Molchan误差图、概率增益/差与修正面积技能评分进行评估；联合预警同时满足低b与高μ条件。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Alborz Fold-Thrust Belt, northern Iran; homogenized IRSC earthquake catalog of 23,961 events with M≥1.5 from 2006 to 2024.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 伊朗北部阿尔博兹褶冲带；IRSC同一化地震目录，共23,961次事件（M≥1.5），时间范围为2006年至2024年。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Relevant to physics-based earthquake forecasting because it tests complementary stress- and loading-related observables (b-value and declustered background rate) and quantifies how their synergy improves spatial alarm efficiency.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与物理驱动地震预测密切相关：该研究检验了与应力状态和构造加载相关的互补观测量（b值与去簇背景地震率），并量化了二者协同如何提升空间预警效率。

paper.title: Spatial dealiasing of classical geomagnetic survey data through use of a microfabricated wearable quantum magnetometer
paper.abstract: Geomagnetic surveys provide insight into the subsurface for a range of applications, from fundamental understanding of geological processes, to mineral exploration and locating unexploded ordnance. A persistent challenge in performing such geomagnetic surveys is the joint problem of anthropogenic noise rejection and spatial aliasing, where the limited bandwidth (< 10 Hz) of traditional surveying instruments introduces artefacts into the surveyed field. Optically Pumped Magnetometers (OPMs) exploit quantum mechanical effects to achieve highly sensitive and stable magnetic field measurements at comparatively high bandwidths. Recent advances in manufacturing have enabled OPMs to be packaged in compact and lightweight systems (approx. 1kg), that are ideal for geomagnetic surveying. Here, we show how an OPM can directly contribute to the reduction of spatial aliasing in traditional PPM data. We carry both a PPM and OPM over a 20 km long transect across the Highland Boundary Fault (HBF) in Scotland. We leverage the continuous acquisition of the OPM sampling at 90 Hz, equivalent to every approx. 1 cm at walking pace (1 m/s) versus every approx. 200 m for our PPM (which had to be stationary for measurements) to reject magnetic noise and identify new small-scale (< 200 m) geological structures. Further, we discuss the logistical advantages of the hybrid survey in terms of portability, survey delivery, data density, and data quality.

analysis.one_sentence_en: A hybrid geomagnetic survey pairing a continuously sampled wearable optical magnetometer with a stationary proton-precession magnetometer reduces spatial aliasing and helps distinguish anthropogenic noise, revealing new small-scale structures across Scotland’s Highland Boundary Fault.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该研究将可穿戴光泵磁强计与普顿进动磁强计结合用于地磁测量，通过连续高采样率降低空间混叠并识别人为噪声，在苏格兰高地边界断层沿线发现更小尺度地质结构。
summary_en: problem: Classical geomagnetic surveys face coupled anthropogenic noise contamination and spatial aliasing from limited bandwidth/measurement cadence.

approach: Perform a 20 km transect survey with both a continuously sampling 90 Hz optical pumped magnetometer and a conventional proton precession magnetometer, then use local OPM variability in moving windows to flag PPM outliers and guide forward modeling of small-scale anomalies.

key result: The hybrid sensor workflow rejects anthropogenic-clutter-degraded PPM points and enables resolution and forward modeling of geological anomalies smaller than about 200 m, which would be obscured or misinterpreted with PPM sampling alone.
summary_zh: problem: 经典地磁测量同时受到人为磁扰的影响，并因传统仪器带宽/采样率有限而产生空间混叠伪影。
approach: 在苏格兰高地边界断层附近沿约20 km测线同步采集高频连续的90 Hz光泵磁强计数据与便携式普顿进动磁强计数据，并利用光泵在以20 m为中心的局部窗口内的标准差来识别并剔除受噪声污染的普顿进动测点，进而对小尺度异常做前向建模。
key result: 该混合测量流程能更可靠地剔除人为噪声导致的异常测点，并支持对约200 m以下尺度的地质异常进行建模与解释，这是仅靠普顿进动采样难以实现的。
analysis.contribution_en: Demonstrates a practical hybrid geomagnetic surveying strategy that uses a wearable microfabricated optical magnetometer’s continuous high-rate sampling to de-alias classical proton-precession survey data and to robustly separate anthropogenic noise from small-scale geological signals for subsequent forward modeling.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出并验证一种实用的混合地磁测量策略：利用可穿戴微机电器件光泵磁强计的连续高采样率，对经典普顿进动测量数据进行空间去混叠，并通过局部噪声度量可靠地区分人为噪声与小尺度地质信号，从而支持后续前向建模解释。
analysis.method_en: Two-sensor transect survey: a wearable microfabricated double-resonance optically pumped magnetometer sampled continuously at 90 Hz while a consumer off-the-shelf proton precession magnetometer provided absolute total-field measurements at discrete locations (stationary sampling). OPM data were windowed (20 m around each PPM point) to compute local standard deviation for outlier/noise flagging; then selected small-scale anomalies were forward-modeled using geometrical susceptibilities with non-unique solution sets.
analysis.method_zh: 双传感器测线：可穿戴微机电双共振光泵磁强计以90 Hz连续采样，而消费级/商用普顿进动磁强计在离散位置进行驻点测量以获得绝对总场强。随后以每个PPM点为中心取20 m局部窗口，计算OPM的局部标准差来标记异常/受噪点污染的PPM测点，并对选定的小尺度异常进行几何体磁化率约束下的前向建模（给出不唯一解集）。
analysis.data_or_region_en: A ~20 km NW–SE ground transect across the Highland Boundary Fault near Blairgowrie, Scotland, using both OPM and PPM in overlapping segments; historical BGS aeromagnetic data were used for qualitative comparison.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 在苏格兰布莱尔高里附近跨越高地边界断层的约20 km NW–SE地面测线，OPM与PPM在重叠路段同步采集；并用英国地质调查局BGS的历史航磁数据进行定性对比（用于叠加参考）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Directly relevant to geomagnetic target detection because it addresses the practical aliasing/noise bottleneck in land surveys and improves resolvable small-scale anomaly mapping; it is not about seismicity/earthquake physics.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与地磁目标探测高度相关，因为它针对陆地地磁测量中的关键瓶颈（空间混叠与人为噪声）进行工程化解决，提升小尺度异常的可分辨与解释能力；但不涉及地震或地震学物理。

paper.title: Local well-posedness for a moving rigid region in Surface Quasi-Geostrophic equations
paper.abstract: We introduce and analyze a class of Surface Quasi-Geostrophic (SQG) equations in the presence of moving rigid obstacles. The model is motivated both by vortex-wave type asymptotics for singular structures in active scalar equations and by geophysical phenomena exhibiting rigid-like coherent regions, such as cyclone eyes or long-lived atmospheric dust clouds. We consider the critical SQG equation in a time-dependent exterior domain generated by a prescribed rigid motion and reconstruct the velocity through a nonlocal elliptic formulation adapted to impermeability constraints. The active scalar is assumed to remain constant inside the rigid region and in a neighborhood of its boundary, yielding a plateau structure compatible with the transport dynamics. For a single moving obstacle, we establish local well-posedness of classical solutions in Sobolev spaces $H^k$, $k\geq 4$ together with uniqueness, local stability, and a blow-up criterion. The analysis relies on a reformulation in adapted coordinates reducing the problem to a fixed domain, combined with integral representations for the fractional elliptic operator, regularization procedures, and a nonlinear fixed-point argument. A central difficulty comes from the critical singularity of the SQG Biot-Savart kernel in the case $s=\frac{1}{2}$, for which the velocity reconstruction near the moving boundary requires commutator estimates. We further prove propagation of the plateau property and derive a priori estimates controlling both the support of the scalar gradient and the Sobolev norm of the solution. This work provides, to our knowledge, the first well-posedness theory for SQG equations with moving rigid obstacles and constitutes a first step toward the rigorous derivation of point-vortex type dynamics from shrinking rigid bodies in SQG flows.

analysis.one_sentence_en: This paper proves local well-posedness for the critical Surface Quasi-Geostrophic (SQG) equation on a time-dependent exterior domain with a prescribed moving rigid obstacle, assuming a plateau (constant) active-scalar near the obstacle boundary.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文在假设刚体附近活跃标量满足“平台结构”(常值)的前提下，证明了临界SQG方程在随时间变化的外部域、带已知运动刚体障碍时的局部良定性。
summary_en: problem: Establish a rigorous SQG well-posedness theory when the domain boundary is a moving rigid obstacle, despite the critical singular Biot–Savart velocity law.

approach: Reformulate SQG in adapted coordinates to fix the domain, reconstruct velocity using a nonlocal fractional elliptic representation enforcing impermeability, and use regularization plus a fixed-point/iteration scheme under a plateau assumption.

key result: For a single moving obstacle and plateau initial data in Sobolev spaces H^k (k≥4), prove uniqueness, local stability, and a blow-up criterion stating breakdown can only occur via divergence of the Sobolev norm.
summary_zh: problem: 当自由边界由运动刚体障碍给出且速度核具有临界奇性时，需要建立SQG方程的严格良定性理论。
approach: 通过适应性坐标把问题转到固定域，利用满足不可穿透约束的分数阶椭圆非局部表示重建速度，并在“平台结构”假设下结合算子正则化与迭代-不动点论证。
key result: 对单个运动刚体且满足平台初值条件的情形（H^k, k≥4），给出解的存在唯一、局部稳定性以及用Sobolev范数发散刻画的爆破准则。
analysis.contribution_en: The main contribution is the first well-posedness framework for the critical SQG equation posed in a time-dependent exterior domain with moving rigid obstacles, including uniqueness, local stability, plateau propagation, and a Sobolev-norm blow-up criterion.
analysis.contribution_zh: 本文的主要贡献是：首次给出临界SQG方程在具有运动刚体障碍的时间相关外部域中适用的良定性理论框架，并包含唯一性、局部稳定性、平台结构的传播以及由Sobolev范数控制的爆破准则。
analysis.method_en: Prescribed rigid motion defines a time-dependent exterior domain; assuming the active scalar is constant inside the rigid region and in a neighborhood of its boundary (plateau), the authors reconstruct the divergence-free velocity via a fractional elliptic/nonlocal stream-function formulation enforcing impermeability, reformulate in adapted coordinates to work on a fixed domain, and prove existence/uniqueness/stability using regularized singular integral representations, iterative schemes, fixed-point arguments, and Sobolev energy estimates.
analysis.method_zh: 刚体的运动被预先给定，从而产生随时间变化的外部流体域；在假设活跃标量于刚体内部及其边界邻域保持常值（平台结构）后，作者通过满足不可穿透约束的分数阶椭圆/非局部流函数表示重建满足散度约束的速度场；再用适应性坐标把问题转到固定域，并结合对奇异积分的正则化、迭代方案-不动点论证以及Sobolev能量估计证明存在性、唯一性与稳定性。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified (mathematical PDE analysis; obstacle motion and domain geometry are prescribed, with no observational dataset or physical grid).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明（纯数学PDE分析；刚体运动与几何由预设给出，无观测数据集或数值网格）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: SQG is a proxy for geophysical active-scalar dynamics; this work clarifies mathematically how coherent “rigid-like” regions could be handled in SQG flows, a step toward rigorous derivations of point-vortex-type dynamics from shrinking rigid bodies.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: SQG可视为地球物理主动标量动力学的理论模型；本文从数学上处理了“类刚体”相干区域在SQG流中的可解性问题，有助于朝着从收缩刚体严格推导点涡/涡动力学的方向迈进。

paper.title: Differentiating Eulerian and Lagrangian Tendencies in the Ocean Interior via a Dynamical Overturning Decomposition
paper.abstract: Repeat observations provide essential constraints on long-term changes in the ocean interior, such as warming and cooling trends. However, attributing these Eulerian signals to either reversible isopycnal heaving or irreversible diabatic transformations remains a fundamental challenge. This ambiguity arises not only from limited velocity observations, but also from the lack of a diagnostic framework capable of explicitly disentangling Lagrangian transformation from Eulerian variability. Recognizing that Eulerian and Lagrangian tendencies can be represented through distinct perspectives of the overturning circulations, we apply a dynamical overturning decomposition to state-of-the-art reanalysis products in the Atlantic, Indo-Pacific, and South China Sea to investigate their long-term behavior. The utility of this framework is supported by strong correlations between independently derived kinematic and thermodynamic indices, indicating a tight coupling between advective and isopycnal-heaving transports. Our analysis reveals distinct dynamical regimes in which similar Eulerian tendencies arise from fundamentally different Lagrangian processes. In particular, we identify (i) previously undiagnosed diapycnal downwelling, despite its prediction by bottom-intensified turbulent dissipation, (ii) coexistence of apparent Eulerian upwelling and diapycnal downwelling, (iii) an Atlantic sub-overturning cell linked to intermediate water-mass formation, and (iv) cases where Eulerian densification masks Lagrangian lightening. These results demonstrate that Eulerian trends alone can be misleading indicators of reversible and irreversible behaviors. By explicitly separating adiabatic heaving from diabatic processes, this framework offers a physically consistent diagnostic for interpreting interior ocean changes and establishes a dynamical basis for assessing the reversibility of such changes.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper builds a dynamical overturning decomposition that separates adiabatic isopycnal heaving from diabatic cross-isopycnal transformation to diagnose how similar Eulerian temperature/density trends can reflect different Lagrangian processes in ocean reanalyses.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文提出动力学翻转分解，将等密面平流的可逆起伏与跨等密面绝热/非绝热转化分离，从而揭示相似的欧拉位势密度趋势可能对应不同的拉格朗日过程。
summary_en: problem: Eulerian interior ocean trends (e.g., warming/cooling or densification/lightening) are ambiguous about whether they arise from reversible isopycnal heaving or irreversible diabatic water-mass transformation.
approach: Apply a dynamical overturning decomposition to reanalysis fields, computing advective (Eulerian), sloshing (isopycnal-displacement), and diapycnal (Eulerian minus sloshing) tendencies.

key result: Across the Atlantic, Indo-Pacific, and South China Sea, the same Eulerian tendency can arise from distinct Lagrangian mechanisms, including diapycnal downwelling, apparent upwelling coexisting with diapycnal downwelling, and cases where Eulerian densification hides Lagrangian lightening.
summary_zh: problem: 海洋内部欧拉趋势（如温度/密度的变化）可能既来自可逆的等密面起伏，也可能来自不可逆的非绝热水团转化，但两者难以区分。
approach: 在重分析数据上使用动力学翻转分解，分别计算平流（欧拉）、摇摆（等密面位移）以及通过欧拉减摇摆得到的跨等密面（非绝热）倾向。
key result: 在大西洋、印度-太平洋和南海中，相似的欧拉倾向对应不同的拉格朗日机制，包括先前未诊断的跨等密面下沉、欧拉上涌与跨等密面下沉并存，以及欧拉增密掩盖拉格朗日变轻等情形。
analysis.contribution_en: Introduces and validates a physically consistent diagnostic framework that disentangles Eulerian variability from Lagrangian transformation by decomposing overturning into advective, isopycnal-sloshing (adiabatic) and diapycnal (diabatic) components using density-space overturning.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出并验证了一种物理一致的诊断框架，通过将翻转环流分解为平流（欧拉）、等密面摇摆（绝热）与跨等密面分量（非绝热），用密度坐标对翻转进行分解，从而把欧拉变化与拉格朗日转化清晰区分开来。
analysis.method_en: Compute advective (Eulerian) and sloshing (from isopycnal depth time evolution) MOC streamfunctions from monthly reanalysis velocity/thermodynamic fields, then define the diapycnal component as their difference to quantify irreversible cross-isopycnal water-mass transformation.
analysis.method_zh: 基于月尺度重分析场计算平流（欧拉）MOC流函数以及由等密面深度随时间演化得到的摇摆（isopycnal-displacement）MOC流函数，并将两者差定义为跨等密面分量以定量不可逆的跨等密面水团转化。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Atlantic Ocean and Indo-Pacific Ocean using ECCO v4r3 (1992–2015 monthly, ~1° horizontal, 50 levels); South China Sea using GLORYS12v1 (1993–2024 monthly, 1/12° horizontal, 50 levels).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 大西洋与印度-太平洋：ECCO v4r3（1992–2015年，月尺度，约1°水平分辨率，50层）；南海：GLORYS12v1（1993–2024年，月尺度，1/12°水平分辨率，50层）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This matters because tracking long-term ocean heat uptake and storage requires knowing whether observed interior temperature/density changes are truly irreversible (diabatic transformation) or mainly reversible (isopycnal heaving); the framework directly addresses this ambiguity.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这对当前追踪主题很重要，因为评估海洋长期吸热与储热需要判断观测到的内部温度/密度变化是不可逆的（非绝热水团转化）还是主要由可逆过程（等密面起伏）造成；该框架正是为解决这种歧义而设计的。

paper.title: Global uniform regularity and vanishing vertical viscosity limit for the compressible Navier--Stokes equations in the half-space
paper.abstract: In geophysical flows such as large-scale ocean dynamics, the vertical viscosity is often much smaller than the horizontal viscosity. This anisotropy makes it natural to ask whether solutions of the full anisotropic compressible Navier--Stokes equations converge, as the vertical viscosity coefficient $\varepsilon \to 0$, to solutions of a horizontally dissipative limit system, and whether this limit can be justified globally in time. Prior work has answered this question locally in time or in the incompressible setting. We resolve this problem for the three-dimensional compressible Navier--Stokes equations in the upper half-space with the Navier slip boundary condition. This paper establishes two main results for small perturbations of a constant equilibrium state. First, we prove the existence of a unique global-in-time solution whose conormal Sobolev norm remains uniformly bounded for all $t \ge 0$ and all $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$.
